# Arthur A. Sabintsev

> Physicist, engineer, and two-time founder. Co-founder of Grove, the team behind Pocket Network. Founder of Gold Ranger Ventures. Took the POKT token past a $1B+ market cap. Contact: arthur@sabintsev.com.

## About
Arthur Ariel Sabintsev is a physicist turned engineer turned founder. He co-founded [Grove](https://grove.city), the team behind [Pocket Network](https://pocket.network) — the decentralized network where machines pay machines for blockchain access billions of times a month — and helped take its token (POKT) past a $1B+ market cap. He also founded [Gold Ranger Ventures](https://goldranger.xyz), where he runs fractional COO/CTO and advisory engagements for AI, crypto, and mobile founders.

## Building
- [Grove](https://grove.city) (CEO)

## Tinkering
- [Gold Ranger Ventures](https://goldranger.xyz)

## Previously
- [Pocket Network](https://pocket.network) (2018–2026)
- [Capital One](https://capitalone.com) (2018–2022)
- [Washington Post](https://washingtonpost.com) (2015–2018)
- [ID.me](https://id.me) (2013–2015)
